title: Vitoria Post-Forge Audit — gap detection + Task/Sprint delegation

userStories.title: Migrations ForgeAuditResult + ForgeAuditAcResult + Task XOR constraint
userStories.description: 3 migrations atômicas. Pre-check Migration 3: Tasks com ambos FKs null devem ser zero. Regenerar database.types.ts. Smoke RLS.
acceptanceCriteria: supabase/migrations/20260531a_forge_audit_result.sql aplicado, tabela ForgeAuditResult existe
supabase/migrations/20260531b_forge_audit_ac_result.sql aplicado, tabela ForgeAuditAcResult existe com UNIQUE(auditId, acIndex)
supabase/migrations/20260531c_task_pr_xor_constraint.sql adicionou acceptanceCriterionRef + CHECK XOR
Pre-check SELECT documentado em comentário da migration 3
RLS de ForgeAuditResult: can_view_project gate funciona
Realtime publication inclui ForgeAuditResult
database.types.ts regenerado com novas tables + Task.acceptanceCriterionRef
Smoke: INSERT Task com ambos null retorna constraint violation
Smoke: INSERT Task com ambos NOT null retorna constraint violation

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name IN ('ForgeAuditResult','ForgeAuditAcResult')
SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.check_constraints WHERE constraint_name='Task_hierarchy_xor'

userStories.title: AC parser uniforme (Json field + §16 fallback)
userStories.description: src/lib/forge/audit/parse-ac-list.ts: parseAcList(prd). Primary: prd.acceptanceCriteria Json. Fallback: §16 stories. Throw 'PRD has no AC to verify' se ambos vazios.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/forge/audit/parse-ac-list.ts exporta parseAcList
Json não-vazio retorna source='json' pra todos AC
Json vazio + §16 stories retorna source='story' com sourceRef preenchido
Ambos vazios: throw com message 'PRD has no AC to verify'
Test: PRD com 3 AC em Json + 5 AC em §16 → 3 AC source='json' (só Json)
Test: PRD com Json vazio + 5 AC em §16 → 5 AC source='story'
Index sequencial 0..N-1, mesmo entre stories

userStories.title: AC verifier subagent (Claude Code Agent + verdict parser)
userStories.description: src/lib/forge/audit/verifier.ts: verifyAc(ac, repoPath, timeoutMs?). Spawn Claude Code Agent com tools restritos (Read/Grep/Glob). Output JSON { verdict, evidence[], notes, costUsd }. Timeout 90s default.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/forge/audit/verifier.ts exporta verifyAc
Allowed tools restritos a Read + Grep + Glob (sem Edit/Write/Bash)
Timeout default 90s; on timeout: verdict='unverifiable', notes contém 'timeout'
Malformed JSON: verdict='unverifiable', notes contém 'parse error'
evidence shape: array de { path, lines?, excerpt? }
costUsd preenchido
Test: mock repo with AC met → verdict='done' + evidence non-empty
Test: mock repo without AC → verdict='missing'

userStories.title: Audit DAL — orquestra clone + verify + persist
userStories.description: src/lib/dal/vitoria-audit.ts: startAudit (sync, returns auditId em <1s), runAudit (background-safe), getAudit. Pipeline: clone repo shallow → parseAcList → verify cada AC → persist ForgeAuditAcResult → aggregate counts → cleanup.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/dal/vitoria-audit.ts exporta startAudit + runAudit + getAudit
startAudit sync: insert row + return auditId em <1s
runAudit background-safe; status updates emit realtime
src/lib/forge/audit/repo-cloner.ts shallow clone --depth 1
Cleanup em finally (mesmo em erro)
Status flow: pending → running → ready (ou failed)
ForgeAuditAcResult UPSERT por (auditId, acIndex) — idempotent
Counts (acDone, acPartial, acMissing, acUnverifiable) corretos
Smoke: startAudit + sleep + getAudit retorna status='ready' com AC results

userStories.title: Task generator — gap → TaskDraft com PRD+AC linkage
userStories.description: src/lib/forge/audit/task-generator.ts: generateTaskDrafts(audit, prd). Para cada AC verdict != done: title (max 80c, action verb), scope (bug/feature/manual_qa), priority (1-3), estimatedFp heurística. acceptanceCriterionRef formato 'audit:<id>:ac:<index>'.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/forge/audit/task-generator.ts exporta generateTaskDrafts
TaskDraft shape documentado em type export
verdict='partial' → scope='bug', priority=2, estimatedFp=1
verdict='missing' → scope='feature', priority=1, estimatedFp ∈ {3,5}
verdict='unverifiable' → scope='manual_qa', priority=3, estimatedFp=2
AC com verdict='done' NÃO gera Task
acceptanceCriterionRef formato: 'audit:<uuid>:ac:<int>'
Title truncated to 80 chars + action verb prefix
Test: audit com 5 AC (3 done, 1 partial, 1 missing) → 2 TaskDrafts

userStories.title: Sprint composer (reuso Consolidator PLAN-011 com prompt adapter)
userStories.description: src/lib/forge/audit/sprint-composer.ts: composeSprintDraft(tasks, projectId). Reusa Consolidator subagent se disponível; fallback ordering puro. Title default '<PRD> — post-Forge gaps'. estimatedDays = ceil(sum FP / 8). Ordering: bug → manual_qa → feature.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/forge/audit/sprint-composer.ts exporta composeSprintDraft
Sem Consolidator: fallback retorna SprintDraft funcional
Title default: '<PRD reference> — post-Forge gaps'
estimatedDays = ceil(sum(estimatedFp) / 8)
tasksOrdered ordering: bugs first, manual_qa second, features third
Within scope: priority ascendente
Test: 5 TaskDrafts (2 bug, 2 feature, 1 qa) → ordem [bug, bug, qa, feature, feature]
Smoke: SprintDraft com 5 tasks totalFp=12 → estimatedDays=2

userStories.title: API endpoints (POST audits / GET / materialize / cancel / list)
userStories.description: 5 routes em src/app/api/forge/audits/. POST audit (202 + auditId), GET detail, POST materialize (SQL atomic transaction com UPSERT dedup), POST cancel, GET list. Schemas Zod em api-schemas.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: src/app/api/forge/audits/route.ts: POST + GET (list)
src/app/api/forge/audits/[id]/route.ts: GET (detail)
src/app/api/forge/audits/[id]/materialize/route.ts: POST
src/app/api/forge/audits/[id]/cancel/route.ts: POST
POST audit sem ForgeRun done → 422
POST com audit em curso pra mesmo PRD → 409
Materialize é transação atomica (rollback em qualquer falha)
UPSERT de Tasks por (productRequirementId, acceptanceCriterionRef) — dedup
Materialize response inclui duplicatesSkipped count
Cancel cleanup clone via repo-cloner.cleanup
Zod schemas em src/lib/forge/audit/api-schemas.ts

userStories.title: UI Vitoria Audit Panel + Review Sheet + trigger + smoke E2E + docs
userStories.description: VitoriaAuditPanel (4 estados) + AuditReviewSheet (ResponsiveSheet lg + Task draft editor com Field). ConfirmDialog pra Materialize. Realtime subscription. Sonner toasts. Smoke E2E test:vitoria-audit-e2e. Docs em forge-runbook.md.
acceptanceCriteria: src/components/prd/vitoria-audit-panel.tsx renderiza 4 estados
Botão 'Audit with Vitoria' só visível se ForgeRun done linkado
src/components/prd/audit-review-sheet.tsx usa ResponsiveSheet (não Sheet raw)
Task draft editor usa Field compound API
Materialize button confirma via ConfirmDialog (não window.confirm)
Realtime subscription pra ForgeAuditResult durante running
Sonner toasts pra erros
script test:vitoria-audit-e2e roda + asserta status flow
docs/runbooks/forge-runbook.md ganha seção 'Vitoria post-Forge audit' (≥3 parágrafos)
